creator: john.pineau@linearlogic.com
text:
Appears to be related to the following issue:

http://h20000.www2.hp.com/bizsupport/TechSupport/Document.jsp?lang=en&cc=us&taskId=110&prodSeriesId=397634&prodTypeId=15351&prodSeriesId==397634&objectID=PSD_EU050629_CW01

Following the instructions did not fully resolve the issue, however
adding an Intel Gigabit NIC into the slot worked around it - server no
longer panics and all three NICs are accessible.
